All right, welcome back in this lesson. We are going to explore a final technique called dynamic pacing or state shifters. It's a term you may have already come across earlier in this Course but in this lesson we're going to go a little bit deeper and unpack exactly how to implement it. So first a note so on pacing context is more important than Content right so if the space is filled with either too much or too fast talking on your part Then almost by law there is less space for them to explore feel into and arrive at their own epiphanies right epiphanies Realizations aha moments these tipping points all require spaciousness to be felt and acted upon so the less Room you give for those the less ability your prospect is going to have to actually arrive at them So strive to go slower allow spaciousness and only speak What is true and necessary and this comes back down to dropping the need to perform? performative coaching or to show off your smartness you're not here to extract the good chunks of this sales call Into amazing Instagram or Facebook content you are here in service of the transformation of The pre client who's on the call with you So remember that strive to go slower allow spaciousness for these insights and realizations to emerge And likewise don't be rigid and formulaic. So nothing about these calls Should feel like you're running through some Seven-step checklist that you need to get through right remember you don't need to explore all seven elements of the Gestalt Only the ones that you sense need to be successfully shifted to the positive pole Right, so that's why some of these calls might be 15 to 20 minutes others might be 55 minutes to an hour It all depends on acknowledging and being present to what actually needs to shift in your prospect for them to be empowered To make a decision by the end of the call. So this shouldn't be rigid You shouldn't make someone go through unnecessary steps or explore elements of of the Of the decision that they've already demonstrated The ability to have moved through on their own Next state shifting question. So in the rare Cases where you sense your pre client is entering some sort of Excessive spin or spiraling around victim hood or complaining about their situation or just sheer overwhelm This is where you get to do do them a favor and gently interrupt it Right, so it could be as simple as hey, can I just stop you for a second? They'll say sure and then you'll say it sounds like you're still working through Quite a bit of difficult feelings around this Are you really sure you're ready to open up to a new experience right now? Right and allow them to reorient themselves, right? So it's not judging them. It's not Interjecting in a way that should make them feel attacked or unheard in any way It's just really acknowledging the situation if they're in a deep spin asking Are you sure you're really ready to experience the new right now? Might get them out of that spin and into a state where they can explore possibility once again Another question is why do you really think you're on this call, right? Like very open-ended. Why do you think you're on this call and get them to connect back to their intention and vision of resolution or a successful outcome Likewise, if you feel their pressure is becoming paralyzing and they're starting to enter this shut down state that can come When someone feels overwhelmed in this state of pressure you can state shift with something like it's my sense that we should maybe Pause this conversation and give you a chance to orient around some of the things We've already explored. Would it feel better to continue this in two to three days from now? Once you've processed some of this out, right? So once again Getting consent to continue the call or asking them and empowering them to dictate where it goes from here, right? Nothing is gained in trying to push through and struggle through a call Where your prospect is experiencing a ton of overwhelm over what has already been excavated, right? And if you try to push through that Chances are not only are you going to erode the trust You're going to erode their ability to feel empowered on the other side of it Whereas if they had two to three days to really let some of those things that have already moved and shifted around To process out they may come to their own conclusion in those two to three days You know that so much has already shifted so much has been revealed and they're really ready to get back on that line and explore What working together it looks like another thing you could say I'm feeling that it might be best to take X program to take this program off the table for a moment would that make you feel better, right? So this is something you may ask or propose in the closing phase of the call right if they are Trying to wrangle in their mind how they're going to make it work either financially or time-wise and You sense that it's moving away from getting resourceful and into a state of panic and anxiety and Just like overwhelming fear right and that's resulting in shutdown do them that favor right Ask them would it feel better if we simply just took this off the table for a moment, right? So they feel like there is an out there, right? And they are Re-consenting to exploring it if and only if they can do so From a sense of power and resourcefulness and courage once again So these state shifters whether it's happening You know in the later part of the call after you've already given the investment options and all the ways to enroll or earlier in the call When they're exploring kind of the depths of the situational gestalt It's all about getting them back into this feeling of safety and power it's all about these Metastates and in them getting to exercise a degree of direction of the call While connecting back to their vision of why they're on this call To begin with so this is a tremendously powerful technique to use I suggest you do use it whenever that Overwhelm that pressure that fear that anxiety that spin even begins to start creeping in and once again It's all about your presence your ability to presence into These energies showing up on the call and how to reorient your prospect back into a place of safety and power So that's it I've loaded you up with some of my favorite most powerful most effective coaching techniques in the next lesson I will go a little bit deeper and how to actually weave these into those seven elements of the situational Gestalt so take a breather review these techniques often layer them into your calls and Practice them right they might not come out perfectly on your next call But these are things that will eventually get more and more integrated Into your natural way of coaching and showing up on these calls So take a breather and I will catch you in the next lesson
